summary: An app that embeds https://t3knologic.github.io/revelation-walls-gallery/ in an iframe. The app is for Revelation Walls Murals and NFTs painted at the Dfinity Foundation, commissioned by Dominic Williams and painted by Candace Marquette. Built by T3kNo-Logic.xyz.
architectural_notes: App is a simple iframe wrapper for https://t3knologic.github.io/revelation-walls-gallery/
Branding: Revelation Walls Murals & NFTs, Dfinity Foundation, commissioned by Dominic Williams, painted by Candace Marquette, built by T3kNo-Logic.xyz
Known layout issue: iframe/app container not filling full screen on mobile; must use 100dvh, width:100vw, no margins/padding on html/body/container
known_issues: App shows a small window instead of full screen on mobile — full-screen layout fix is in progress

existing_features.title: Create a full-page iframe that embeds https://t3knologic.github.io/revelation-walls-gallery/ as the primary content of the app, filling the entire viewport.

Add a minimal branded header or footer bar that displays the app context: 'Revelation Walls – Murals & NFTs at the Dfinity Foundation | Commissioned by Dominic Williams | Painted by Candace Marquette | Built by T3kNo-Logic.xyz'. This bar must be non-intrusive and not obscure the gallery content.

Apply a bold, gallery-focused visual theme with a dark background, strong typographic hierarchy, and accent colors inspired by mural art (warm golds, deep blacks, and rich accent tones). Enforce this style consistently across the branded bar and any surrounding UI elements.

Ensure the embedded iframe fills the entire screen on mobile devices. The root app container, all wrapper elements, and the iframe itself must expand to cover 100% of the visible viewport with no gaps, scrollbars, or unused whitespace. Use CSS techniques such as `position: fixed`, `width: 100vw`, `height: 100vh` (with `100dvh` as a fallback for dynamic viewport), `inset: 0`, and `overflow: hidden` on the html/body and all container elements to eliminate any small or constrained window appearance. The branded bar must remain visible but must not reduce the iframe's height — use absolute or fixed positioning for the bar overlaid on the iframe so the iframe still occupies the full viewport behind it.
